WITH "seven_day_users" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT "USER_PSEUDO_ID"
  FROM (
    SELECT "EVENT_PARAMS", "USER_PSEUDO_ID"
    FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210101
    UNION ALL
    SELECT "EVENT_PARAMS", "USER_PSEUDO_ID"
    FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210102
    UNION ALL
    SELECT "EVENT_PARAMS", "USER_PSEUDO_ID"
    FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210103
    UNION ALL
    SELECT "EVENT_PARAMS", "USER_PSEUDO_ID"
    FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210104
    UNION ALL
    SELECT "EVENT_PARAMS", "USER_PSEUDO_ID"
    FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210105
    UNION ALL
    SELECT "EVENT_PARAMS", "USER_PSEUDO_ID"
    FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210106
    UNION ALL
    SELECT "EVENT_PARAMS", "USER_PSEUDO_ID"
    FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210107
  ) AS "e",
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "e"."EVENT_PARAMS") AS "ep"
  WHERE "ep"."VALUE":"key"::TEXT = 'engagement_time_msec'
    AND COALESCE("ep"."VALUE":"value":"int_value"::NUMBER, 0) > 0
),
"two_day_users" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT "USER_PSEUDO_ID"
  FROM (
    SELECT "EVENT_PARAMS", "USER_PSEUDO_ID"
    FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210106
    UNION ALL
    SELECT "EVENT_PARAMS", "USER_PSEUDO_ID"
    FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210107
  ) AS "e",
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "e"."EVENT_PARAMS") AS "ep"
  WHERE "ep"."VALUE":"key"::TEXT = 'engagement_time_msec'
    AND COALESCE("ep"."VALUE":"value":"int_value"::NUMBER, 0) > 0
)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "s"."USER_PSEUDO_ID") AS "distinct_pseudo_users_7day_not_2day"
FROM "seven_day_users" AS "s"
LEFT JOIN "two_day_users" AS "t"
  ON "s"."USER_PSEUDO_ID" = "t"."USER_PSEUDO_ID"
WHERE "t"."USER_PSEUDO_ID" IS NULL;

WITH "all_sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    "trafficSource":"source"::STRING AS "traffic_source",
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TRY_TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month",
    COALESCE("totals":"totalTransactionRevenue"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transaction_revenue"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170430
  WHERE TRY_TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') >= '2017-01-01'::DATE
    AND TRY_TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') < '2018-01-01'::DATE

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    "trafficSource":"source"::STRING AS "traffic_source",
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE('20170228', 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month",
    COALESCE("trafficSource":"totalTransactionRevenue"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transaction_revenue"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170228

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    "trafficSource":"source"::STRING AS "traffic_source",
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE('20170330', 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month",
    COALESCE("trafficSource":"totalTransactionRevenue"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transaction_revenue"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170330

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    "trafficSource":"source"::STRING AS "traffic_source",
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE('20170331', 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month",
    COALESCE("trafficSource":"totalTransactionRevenue"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transaction_revenue"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170331

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    "trafficSource":"source"::STRING AS "traffic_source",
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE('20170630', 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month",
    COALESCE("trafficSource":"totalTransactionRevenue"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transaction_revenue"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170630

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    "trafficSource":"source"::STRING AS "traffic_source",
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE('20170225', 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month",
    COALESCE("trafficSource":"totalTransactionRevenue"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transaction_revenue"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170225

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    "trafficSource":"source"::STRING AS "traffic_source",
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE('20170325', 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month",
    COALESCE("trafficSource":"totalTransactionRevenue"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transaction_revenue"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170325

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    "trafficSource":"source"::STRING AS "traffic_source",
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE('20170227', 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month",
    COALESCE("trafficSource":"totalTransactionRevenue"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transaction_revenue"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170227
),
"monthly_revenue" AS (
  SELECT
    "traffic_source",
    "month",
    SUM("transaction_revenue") AS "monthly_total_revenue"
  FROM "all_sessions"
  GROUP BY
    "traffic_source",
    "month"
),
"traffic_source_totals" AS (
  SELECT
    "traffic_source",
    SUM("monthly_total_revenue") AS "total_revenue_2017"
  FROM "monthly_revenue"
  GROUP BY "traffic_source"
),
"top_traffic_source" AS (
  SELECT
    "traffic_source"
  FROM "traffic_source_totals"
  ORDER BY "total_revenue_2017" DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  m."traffic_source",
  ROUND((MAX(m."monthly_total_revenue") - MIN(m."monthly_total_revenue")) / 1000000, 2) AS "difference_in_millions"
FROM "monthly_revenue" AS m
JOIN "top_traffic_source" AS t
  ON m."traffic_source" = t."traffic_source"
GROUP BY m."traffic_source"

  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170228
),
"first_visit" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    MIN("session_date") AS "first_visit_date"
  FROM "feb_sessions"
  GROUP BY "fullVisitorId"
),
"transaction_sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "session_date",
    "visitStartTime",
    "device":"deviceCategory"::STRING AS "device_type"
  FROM "feb_sessions"
  WHERE COALESCE("totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) > 0
),
"first_transaction" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "session_date" AS "first_transaction_date",
    "device_type"
  FROM "transaction_sessions"
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY "fullVisitorId"
    ORDER BY "session_date", "visitStartTime"
  ) = 1
)
SELECT
  "fv"."fullVisitorId",
  DATEDIFF('day', "fv"."first_visit_date", "ft"."first_transaction_date") AS "days_elapsed",
  "ft"."device_type"
FROM "first_visit" AS "fv"
INNER JOIN "first_transaction" AS "ft"
  ON "fv"."fullVisitorId" = "ft"."fullVisitorId"
ORDER BY "fv"."fullVisitorId"

WITH "sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "trafficSource":"source"::STRING AS "traffic_source",
    "hits" AS "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170616
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "trafficSource":"source"::STRING AS "traffic_source",
    "hits" AS "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170620
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "trafficSource":"source"::STRING AS "traffic_source",
    "hits" AS "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170625
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "trafficSource":"source"::STRING AS "traffic_source",
    "hits" AS "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170626
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "trafficSource":"source"::STRING AS "traffic_source",
    "hits" AS "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170630
),
"product_revenue_by_day" AS (
  SELECT
    "s"."traffic_source" AS "traffic_source",
    "s"."session_date" AS "day",
    SUM("product".value:"productRevenue"::NUMBER) AS "daily_product_revenue"
  FROM "sessions" AS "s",
    LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "s"."hits") AS "hit",
    LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "hit".value:"product") AS "product"
  WHERE "s"."session_date" BETWEEN TO_DATE('2017-01-01') AND TO_DATE('2017-06-30')
    AND "s"."traffic_source" IS NOT NULL
    AND "product".value:"productRevenue" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY
    "s"."traffic_source",
    "s"."session_date"
),
"top_source" AS (
  SELECT
    "traffic_source"
  FROM "product_revenue_by_day"
  GROUP BY "traffic_source"
  ORDER BY SUM("daily_product_revenue") DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
"daily_max" AS (
  SELECT
    "traffic_source",
    MAX("daily_product_revenue") / 1000000 AS "max_daily_revenue_millions"
  FROM "product_revenue_by_day"
  WHERE "traffic_source" = (SELECT "traffic_source" FROM "top_source")
  GROUP BY "traffic_source"
),
"weekly_revenue" AS (
  SELECT
    "traffic_source",
    DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', "day") AS "week",
    SUM("daily_product_revenue") AS "weekly_product_revenue"
  FROM "product_revenue_by_day"
  WHERE "traffic_source" = (SELECT "traffic_source" FROM "top_source")
  GROUP BY
    "traffic_source",
    DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', "day")
),
"weekly_max" AS (
  SELECT
    "traffic_source",
    MAX("weekly_product_revenue") / 1000000 AS "max_weekly_revenue_millions"
  FROM "weekly_revenue"
  GROUP BY "traffic_source"
),
"monthly_revenue" AS (
  SELECT
    "traffic_source",
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', "day") AS "month",
    SUM("daily_product_revenue") AS "monthly_product_revenue"
  FROM "product_revenue_by_day"
  WHERE "traffic_source" = (SELECT "traffic_source" FROM "top_source")
  GROUP BY
    "traffic_source",
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', "day")
),
"monthly_max" AS (
  SELECT
    "traffic_source",
    MAX("monthly_product_revenue") / 1000000 AS "max_monthly_revenue_millions"
  FROM "monthly_revenue"
  GROUP BY "traffic_source"
)
SELECT
  "t"."traffic_source",
  "d"."max_daily_revenue_millions",
  "w"."max_weekly_revenue_millions",
  "m"."max_monthly_revenue_millions"
FROM "top_source" AS "t"
JOIN "daily_max" AS "d"
  ON "d"."traffic_source" = "t"."traffic_source"
JOIN "weekly_max" AS "w"
  ON "w"."traffic_source" = "t"."traffic_source"
JOIN "monthly_max" AS "m"
  ON "m"."traffic_source" = "t"."traffic_source";

final_sql:
WITH "all_sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    "date",
    "fullVisitorId",
    "totals",
    "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170415
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "date",
    "fullVisitorId",
    "totals",
    "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170430
),
"session_data" AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE("s"."date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "session_month",
    "s"."fullVisitorId" AS "fullVisitorId",
    TRY_TO_NUMBER("s"."totals":"pageviews"::STRING) AS "pageviews",
    TRY_TO_NUMBER("s"."totals":"transactions"::STRING) AS "transactions",
    MAX(TRY_TO_NUMBER("hit_product".value:"productRevenue"::STRING)) AS "product_revenue"
  FROM "all_sessions" AS "s",
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "s"."hits") AS "hit",
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "hit".value:"product") AS "hit_product"
  WHERE TO_DATE("s"."date", 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN TO_DATE('2017-04-01') AND TO_DATE('2017-07-31')
  GROUP BY
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE("s"."date", 'YYYYMMDD')),
    "s"."fullVisitorId",
    TRY_TO_NUMBER("s"."totals":"pageviews"::STRING),
    TRY_TO_NUMBER("s"."totals":"transactions"::STRING)
),
"classified_sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    "session_month",
    "fullVisitorId",
    "pageviews",
    CASE
      WHEN "transactions" >= 1 AND "product_revenue" IS NOT NULL THEN 'purchase'
      WHEN "transactions" IS NULL AND "product_revenue" IS NULL THEN 'non-purchase'
    END AS "purchase_status"
  FROM "session_data"
)
SELECT
  "session_month",
  "purchase_status",
  SUM("pageviews") AS "total_pageviews",
  COUNT(DISTINCT "fullVisitorId") AS "distinct_visitors",
  SUM("pageviews") / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT "fullVisitorId"), 0) AS "avg_pageviews_per_visitor"
FROM "classified_sessions"
WHERE "purchase_status" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
  "session_month",
  "purchase_status"
ORDER BY
  "session_month" ASC,
  "purchase_status" ASC

final_sql:
WITH "all_sessions" AS (
  SELECT "fullVisitorId", "date", "hits"
  FROM "GA360"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GA_SESSIONS_20170715"
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "fullVisitorId", "date", "hits"
  FROM "GA360"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GA_SESSIONS_20170726"
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "fullVisitorId", "date", "hits"
  FROM "GA360"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GA_SESSIONS_20170727"
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "fullVisitorId", "date", "hits"
  FROM "GA360"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GA_SESSIONS_20170731"
),
"youtube_buyers" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    "s"."fullVisitorId"
  FROM "all_sessions" AS "s",
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "s"."hits") AS "hit",
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "hit".value:"product") AS "product"
  WHERE TO_DATE("s"."date", 'YYYYMMDD') >= DATE '2017-07-01'
    AND TO_DATE("s"."date", 'YYYYMMDD') < DATE '2017-08-01'
    AND LOWER("product".value:"v2ProductName"::STRING) LIKE '%youtube%'
    AND COALESCE("product".value:"productQuantity"::NUMBER, 0) > 0
),
"product_totals" AS (
  SELECT
    "product".value:"v2ProductName"::STRING AS "v2ProductName",
    SUM(COALESCE("product".value:"productQuantity"::NUMBER, 0)) AS "total_quantity_purchased"
  FROM "all_sessions" AS "s"
  INNER JOIN "youtube_buyers" AS "yb"
    ON "s"."fullVisitorId" = "yb"."fullVisitorId",
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "s"."hits") AS "hit",
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "hit".value:"product") AS "product"
  WHERE TO_DATE("s"."date", 'YYYYMMDD') >= DATE '2017-07-01'
    AND TO_DATE("s"."date", 'YYYYMMDD') < DATE '2017-08-01'
    AND LOWER("product".value:"v2ProductName"::STRING) NOT LIKE '%youtube%'
    AND COALESCE("product".value:"productQuantity"::NUMBER, 0) > 0
  GROUP BY "product".value:"v2ProductName"::STRING
)
SELECT "v2ProductName"
FROM "product_totals"
ORDER BY "total_quantity_purchased" DESC, "v2ProductName"
LIMIT 1

final_sql:
WITH "sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "visitId",
    "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170130
  WHERE "trafficSource":"campaign"::STRING ILIKE '%Data Share%'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "visitId",
    "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170131
  WHERE "trafficSource":"campaign"::STRING ILIKE '%Data Share%'
),
"hit_rows" AS (
  SELECT
    s."fullVisitorId",
    s."visitId",
    f.index AS "hit_index",
    f.value:"page":"pagePath"::STRING AS "pagePath",
    f.value:"isInteraction"::BOOLEAN AS "isInteraction",
    f.value:"time"::NUMBER / 1000 AS "hit_time_seconds"
  FROM "sessions" AS s,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => s."hits") AS f
),
"home_transitions" AS (
  SELECT
    h1."fullVisitorId",
    h1."visitId",
    h2."pagePath" AS "next_page",
    h2."hit_time_seconds" - h1."hit_time_seconds" AS "seconds_on_home"
  FROM "hit_rows" AS h1
  JOIN "hit_rows" AS h2
    ON h1."fullVisitorId" = h2."fullVisitorId"
   AND h1."visitId" = h2."visitId"
   AND h2."hit_index" = h1."hit_index" + 1
  WHERE h1."pagePath" LIKE '/home%'
    AND h2."pagePath" IS NOT NULL
),
"next_page_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    "next_page",
    COUNT(*) AS "transition_count"
  FROM "home_transitions"
  GROUP BY "next_page"
),
"top_next_page" AS (
  SELECT
    "next_page"
  FROM "next_page_counts"
  ORDER BY "transition_count" DESC, "next_page"
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  t."next_page",
  MAX(h."seconds_on_home") AS "max_seconds_on_home"
FROM "top_next_page" AS t
JOIN "home_transitions" AS h
  ON t."next_page" = h."next_page"
GROUP BY t."next_page"
selection_reason: Candidate 2 (strategy=join_first) scored -20.0; best score among failed candidates; shape: small result confirmed

final_sql:
WITH "sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TRY_TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month",
    "fullVisitorId",
    "totals":"pageviews"::NUMBER AS "pageviews",
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE("totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) >= 1 THEN 'purchase'
      ELSE 'non_purchase'
    END AS "classification"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170602
  WHERE TRY_TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN '2017-06-01' AND '2017-07-31'
    AND "totals":"pageviews" IS NOT NULL
),
"months" AS (
  SELECT TO_DATE('2017-06-01') AS "month"
  UNION ALL
  SELECT TO_DATE('2017-07-01') AS "month"
),
"visitor_month_classification" AS (
  SELECT
    "month",
    "fullVisitorId",
    "classification",
    SUM("pageviews") AS "total_pageviews"
  FROM "sessions"
  GROUP BY
    "month",
    "fullVisitorId",
    "classification"
),
"monthly_averages" AS (
  SELECT
    "month",
    "classification",
    AVG("total_pageviews") AS "avg_pageviews_per_visitor"
  FROM "visitor_month_classification"
  GROUP BY
    "month",
    "classification"
)
SELECT
  "m"."month",
  MAX(CASE WHEN "ma"."classification" = 'purchase' THEN "ma"."avg_pageviews_per_visitor" END) AS "avg_purchase_pageviews_per_visitor",
  MAX(CASE WHEN "ma"."classification" = 'non_purchase' THEN "ma"."avg_pageviews_per_visitor" END) AS "avg_non_purchase_pageviews_per_visitor"
FROM "months" AS "m"
LEFT JOIN "monthly_averages" AS "ma"
  ON "m"."month" = "ma"."month"
GROUP BY "m"."month"
ORDER BY "m"."month" ASC
selection_reason: Candidate 5 (strategy=default) scored -15.0; best score among failed candidates; shape: small result confirmed

final_sql:
WITH "user_events" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "event_date",
    "visitStartTime" AS "event_time",
    "device":"deviceCategory"::STRING AS "device_category",
    COALESCE("totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transactions"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160814
  WHERE "fullVisitorId" IS NOT NULL
),
"user_summary" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    MIN("event_date") AS "first_visit_date",
    MAX("event_date") AS "last_visit_date",
    MIN(IFF("transactions" > 0, "event_date", NULL)) AS "first_transaction_date"
  FROM "user_events"
  GROUP BY "fullVisitorId"
),
"last_recorded_event" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "first_visit_date",
    CASE
      WHEN "first_transaction_date" IS NOT NULL
       AND "first_transaction_date" < "last_visit_date" THEN "first_transaction_date"
      ELSE "last_visit_date"
    END AS "last_recorded_event_date"
  FROM "user_summary"
),
"mobile_last_events" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    l."fullVisitorId",
    l."first_visit_date",
    l."last_recorded_event_date"
  FROM "last_recorded_event" l
  JOIN "user_events" e
    ON l."fullVisitorId" = e."fullVisitorId"
   AND l."last_recorded_event_date" = e."event_date"
  WHERE e."device_category" = 'mobile'
)
SELECT
  MAX(DATEDIFF('day', "first_visit_date", "last_recorded_event_date")) AS "longest_days"
FROM "mobile_last_events"

WITH "sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "userId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "device":"deviceCategory"::STRING AS "deviceCategory",
    COALESCE("totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transactions"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160804
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "userId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "device":"deviceCategory"::STRING AS "deviceCategory",
    COALESCE("totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transactions"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160805
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "userId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "device":"deviceCategory"::STRING AS "deviceCategory",
    COALESCE("totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transactions"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160806
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "userId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "device":"deviceCategory"::STRING AS "deviceCategory",
    COALESCE("totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transactions"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160819
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "userId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "device":"deviceCategory"::STRING AS "deviceCategory",
    COALESCE("totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transactions"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160823
),
"first_visits" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    MIN("session_date") AS "first_visit_date"
  FROM "sessions"
  WHERE "session_date" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY "fullVisitorId"
),
"first_transactions" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "userId",
    "session_date" AS "first_transaction_date",
    "deviceCategory"
  FROM "sessions"
  WHERE COALESCE("transactions", 0) > 0
    AND "session_date" IS NOT NULL
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY "fullVisitorId"
    ORDER BY "session_date" ASC
  ) = 1
)
SELECT
  fv."fullVisitorId",
  ft."userId"
FROM "first_visits" AS fv
JOIN "first_transactions" AS ft
  ON fv."fullVisitorId" = ft."fullVisitorId"
WHERE ft."first_transaction_date" > fv."first_visit_date"
  AND ft."deviceCategory" ILIKE '%mobile%'
ORDER BY
  fv."fullVisitorId" ASC,
  ft."userId" ASC

WITH "all_sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "visitNumber",
    "visitStartTime",
    "date",
    "totals"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160805
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "visitNumber",
    "visitStartTime",
    "date",
    "totals"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160806
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "visitNumber",
    "visitStartTime",
    "date",
    "totals"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160827
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "visitNumber",
    "visitStartTime",
    "date",
    "totals"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160831
),
"new_users_in_period" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "visitStartTime",
    COALESCE("totals":"timeOnSite"::NUMBER, 0) AS "time_on_site"
  FROM "all_sessions"
  WHERE "visitNumber" = 1
    AND TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN TO_DATE('2016-08-01') AND TO_DATE('2017-04-30')
    AND "fullVisitorId" IS NOT NULL
),
"qualified_users" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "visitStartTime"
  FROM "new_users_in_period"
  WHERE "time_on_site" > 300
),
"subsequent_purchasers" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    q."fullVisitorId"
  FROM "qualified_users" AS q
  JOIN "all_sessions" AS s
    ON s."fullVisitorId" = q."fullVisitorId"
   AND s."visitStartTime" > q."visitStartTime"
  WHERE COALESCE(s."totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) > 0
)
SELECT
  100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT p."fullVisitorId") / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT n."fullVisitorId"), 0) AS "percentage"
FROM "new_users_in_period" AS n
LEFT JOIN "subsequent_purchasers" AS p
  ON n."fullVisitorId" = p."fullVisitorId";
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -20.0; best score among failed candidates; shape: aggregate shape confirmed

WITH "patents_base" AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number",
    TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR("publication_date"), 'YYYYMMDD') AS "publication_dt",
    ARRAY_SIZE("inventor") AS "inventor_count"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
  WHERE "country_code" = 'CA'
    AND "publication_date" >= 19600101
    AND "publication_date" <= 20201231
    AND "inventor" IS NOT NULL
    AND ARRAY_SIZE("inventor") > 0
),
"patents_periodized" AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number",
    "inventor_count",
    1960 + FLOOR((EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "publication_dt") - 1960) / 5) * 5 AS "period_start_year"
  FROM "patents_base"
  WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "publication_dt") BETWEEN 1960 AND 2020
)
SELECT
  CONCAT(TO_VARCHAR("period_start_year"), '-', TO_VARCHAR("period_start_year" + 4)) AS "five_year_period",
  AVG("inventor_count") AS "avg_inventors_per_patent",
  COUNT(*) AS "total_patent_publications"
FROM "patents_periodized"
GROUP BY "period_start_year"
ORDER BY "period_start_year" ASC
selection_reason: Candidate 2 (strategy=join_first) scored -25.0; best score among failed candidates

WITH "a61_publications" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    "p"."assignee_harmonized":"name"::TEXT AS "assignee_name",
    "p"."country_code" AS "country_code",
    "p"."publication_number" AS "publication_number",
    TRY_TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR("p"."publication_number", '\\d{4}')) AS "publication_year"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS "p",
       LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "p"."ipc") AS "ipc_flat"
  WHERE "ipc_flat".value:"code"::TEXT LIKE 'A61%'
    AND "p"."assignee_harmonized":"name"::TEXT IS NOT NULL
    AND "p"."publication_number" IS NOT NULL
    AND "p"."country_code" IS NOT NULL
),
"assignee_totals" AS (
  SELECT
    "assignee_name",
    COUNT(DISTINCT "publication_number") AS "patent_count"
  FROM "a61_publications"
  GROUP BY "assignee_name"
),
"top_assignee" AS (
  SELECT
    "assignee_name"
  FROM "assignee_totals"
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY "patent_count" DESC, "assignee_name") = 1
),
"assignee_year_totals" AS (
  SELECT
    "a"."assignee_name",
    DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', TO_DATE("a"."publication_year" || '-01-01')) AS "pub_year",
    COUNT(DISTINCT "a"."publication_number") AS "patent_count"
  FROM "a61_publications" AS "a"
  INNER JOIN "top_assignee" AS "t"
    ON "a"."assignee_name" = "t"."assignee_name"
  WHERE "a"."publication_year" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY
    "a"."assignee_name",
    DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', TO_DATE("a"."publication_year" || '-01-01'))
),
"busiest_year" AS (
  SELECT
    "assignee_name",
    "pub_year"
  FROM "assignee_year_totals"
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "assignee_name" ORDER BY "patent_count" DESC, "pub_year") = 1
),
"jurisdiction_totals" AS (
  SELECT
    "a"."country_code",
    COUNT(DISTINCT "a"."publication_number") AS "patent_count"
  FROM "a61_publications" AS "a"
  INNER JOIN "busiest_year" AS "b"
    ON "a"."assignee_name" = "b"."assignee_name"
   AND DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', TO_DATE("a"."publication_year" || '-01-01')) = "b"."pub_year"
  GROUP BY "a"."country_code"
),
"top_5_jurisdictions" AS (
  SELECT
    "country_code",
    "patent_count"
  FROM "jurisdiction_totals"
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY "patent_count" DESC, "country_code") <= 5
)
SELECT LISTAGG("country_code", ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "patent_count" DESC, "country_code") AS "top_5_jurisdiction_codes"
FROM "top_5_jurisdictions";
selection_reason: Candidate 3 (strategy=metric_first) scored -45.0; best score among failed candidates; shape: small result confirmed

final_sql:
WITH "a61_applications" AS (
  SELECT
    "p"."application_number",
    "p"."filing_date",
    COALESCE(
      "p"."assignee_harmonized":"name"::TEXT,
      "p"."assignee_harmonized":"organization"::TEXT,
      "p"."assignee":"name"::TEXT,
      "p"."assignee":"organization"::TEXT,
      TO_VARCHAR("p"."assignee_harmonized"),
      TO_VARCHAR("p"."assignee")
    ) AS "assignee_name"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS "p"
  WHERE TO_VARCHAR("p"."application_number") IS NOT NULL
    AND (
      TO_VARCHAR("p"."uspc") ILIKE '%A61%'
      OR TO_VARCHAR("p"."publication_number") ILIKE '%A61%'
      OR TO_VARCHAR("p"."application_kind") ILIKE '%A61%'
    )
),
"assignee_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    "a"."assignee_name",
    COUNT(*) AS "application_count_by_assignee_within_A61"
  FROM "a61_applications" AS "a"
  WHERE "a"."assignee_name" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY "a"."assignee_name"
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    ORDER BY "application_count_by_assignee_within_A61" DESC, "a"."assignee_name"
  ) = 1
),
"year_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    "a"."assignee_name",
    DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR("a"."filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "filing_year",
    COUNT(*) AS "application_count_by_year_for_selected_assignee"
  FROM "a61_applications" AS "a"
  INNER JOIN "assignee_counts" AS "t"
    ON "a"."assignee_name" = "t"."assignee_name"
  WHERE "a"."filing_date" IS NOT NULL
    AND TRY_TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR("a"."filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD') IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY
    "a"."assignee_name",
    DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR("a"."filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD'))
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    ORDER BY "application_count_by_year_for_selected_assignee" DESC, "filing_year"
  ) = 1
)
SELECT
  "y"."assignee_name",
  "y"."filing_year" AS "filing_date",
  "y"."application_count_by_year_for_selected_assignee" AS "application_count",
  "t"."application_count_by_assignee_within_A61" AS "top_assignee_application_count",
  "y"."application_count_by_year_for_selected_assignee" AS "top_year_application_count"
FROM "year_counts" AS "y"
INNER JOIN "assignee_counts" AS "t"
  ON "y"."assignee_name" = "t"."assignee_name";
selection_reason: Candidate 3 (strategy=metric_first) scored -30.0; best score among failed candidates; shape: small result confirmed

final_sql:
WITH "class_apps" AS (
  SELECT
    "p"."application_number" AS "application_number",
    "p"."country_code" AS "country_code",
    COALESCE(
      TRY_TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR("p"."application_number", '(19|20)[0-9]{2}')),
      TRY_TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR("p"."application_number_formatted", '(19|20)[0-9]{2}')),
      TRY_TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR("p"."publication_number", '(19|20)[0-9]{2}'))
    ) AS "application_year",
    COALESCE(
      "f1".value:"name"::TEXT,
      "f2".value:"name"::TEXT
    ) AS "assignee_name"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS "p"
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "p"."assignee_harmonized") AS "f1" ON TRUE
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "p"."assignee") AS "f2" ON TRUE
  WHERE (
    "p"."publication_number" ILIKE '%A01B3%'
    OR "p"."application_number" ILIKE '%A01B3%'
    OR "p"."application_number_formatted" ILIKE '%A01B3%'
    OR "p"."kind_code" ILIKE '%A01B3%'
    OR "p"."application_kind" ILIKE '%A01B3%'
  )
  AND COALESCE(
    "f1".value:"name"::TEXT,
    "f2".value:"name"::TEXT
  ) IS NOT NULL
),
"assignee_totals_base" AS (
  SELECT
    "assignee_name",
    COUNT(DISTINCT "application_number") AS "total_applications"
  FROM "class_apps"
  GROUP BY "assignee_name"
),
"assignee_totals" AS (
  SELECT
    "assignee_name",
    "total_applications"
  FROM "assignee_totals_base"
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY "total_applications" DESC, "assignee_name") <= 3
),
"assignee_years" AS (
  SELECT
    "c"."assignee_name",
    "c"."application_year",
    COUNT(DISTINCT "c"."application_number") AS "applications_in_year"
  FROM "class_apps" AS "c"
  INNER JOIN "assignee_totals" AS "t"
    ON "c"."assignee_name" = "t"."assignee_name"
  GROUP BY "c"."assignee_name", "c"."application_year"
),
"top_years" AS (
  SELECT
    "assignee_name",
    "application_year",
    "applications_in_year"
  FROM "assignee_years"
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY "assignee_name"
    ORDER BY "applications_in_year" DESC, "application_year"
  ) = 1
),
"year_country_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    "c"."assignee_name",
    "c"."application_year",
    "c"."country_code",
    COUNT(DISTINCT "c"."application_number") AS "applications_in_year_country"
  FROM "class_apps" AS "c"
  INNER JOIN "top_years" AS "y"
    ON "c"."assignee_name" = "y"."assignee_name"
   AND (
     ("c"."application_year" = "y"."application_year")
     OR ("c"."application_year" IS NULL AND "y"."application_year" IS NULL)
   )
  GROUP BY "c"."assignee_name", "c"."application_year", "c"."country_code"
),
"top_countries" AS (
  SELECT
    "assignee_name",
    "application_year",
    "country_code",
    "applications_in_year_country"
  FROM "year_country_counts"
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY "assignee_name", "application_year"
    ORDER BY "applications_in_year_country" DESC, "country_code"
  ) = 1
)
SELECT
  "t"."assignee_name" AS "name_of_assignee",
  "t"."total_applications" AS "total_number_of_applications",
  "y"."application_year" AS "year_with_most_applications",
  "y"."applications_in_year" AS "number_of_applications_in_that_year",
  "c"."country_code" AS "country_code_with_most_applications_during_that_year"
FROM "assignee_totals" AS "t"
LEFT JOIN "top_years" AS "y"
  ON "t"."assignee_name" = "y"."assignee_name"
LEFT JOIN "top_countries" AS "c"
  ON "y"."assignee_name" = "c"."assignee_name"
 AND (
   ("y"."application_year" = "c"."application_year")
   OR ("y"."application_year" IS NULL AND "c"."application_year" IS NULL)
 )
ORDER BY "total_number_of_applications" DESC, "name_of_assignee";
selection_reason: Candidate 7 (strategy=metric_first) scored -40.0; best score among failed candidates

WITH "months" AS (
  SELECT
    DATEADD(MONTH, SEQ4(), DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE('2008-01-01'))) AS "month_start"
  FROM TABLE(GENERATOR(ROWCOUNT => 180))
),
"iot_publications" AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TRY_TO_DATE("p"."filing_date"::STRING, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month_start",
    COUNT(*) AS "publication_count"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS "p"
  WHERE "p"."publication_number" ILIKE 'US%'
    AND "p"."filing_date" BETWEEN 20080101 AND 20221231
    AND "p"."abstract_localized"::STRING ILIKE '%internet of things%'
    AND TRY_TO_DATE("p"."filing_date"::STRING, 'YYYYMMDD') IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TRY_TO_DATE("p"."filing_date"::STRING, 'YYYYMMDD'))
)
SELECT
  "m"."month_start",
  COALESCE("i"."publication_count", 0) AS "publication_count"
FROM "months" AS "m"
LEFT JOIN "iot_publications" AS "i"
  ON "m"."month_start" = "i"."month_start"
ORDER BY "m"."month_start" ASC

WITH "granted_2010_utility" AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number",
    "application_number",
    "filing_date"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
  WHERE "grant_date" BETWEEN 20100101 AND 20101231
    AND "filing_date" IS NOT NULL
    AND "application_kind" = 'U'
),
"forward_citations" AS (
  SELECT
    c.value:"publication_number"::STRING AS "cited_publication_number",
    p."application_number" AS "citing_application_number",
    p."filing_date" AS "citing_filing_date"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS p,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => p."citation") AS c
  WHERE c.value:"publication_number" IS NOT NULL
    AND p."application_number" IS NOT NULL
    AND p."filing_date" IS NOT NULL
),
"patents_with_one_forward_citation" AS (
  SELECT
    g."publication_number"
  FROM "granted_2010_utility" AS g
  JOIN "forward_citations" AS f
    ON f."cited_publication_number" = g."publication_number"
   AND TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR(f."citing_filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD') >= TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR(g."filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD')
   AND TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR(f."citing_filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD') <= DATEADD(YEAR, 10, TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR(g."filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD'))
  GROUP BY g."publication_number"
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT f."citing_application_number") = 1
)
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS "patents_with_exactly_one_forward_citation"
FROM "patents_with_one_forward_citation";

WITH "granted_patents" AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number",
    "citation"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
  WHERE "grant_date" BETWEEN 20100101 AND 20181231
),
"citation_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    p."publication_number",
    COUNT(c.value) AS "backward_citation_count_sea",
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p."publication_number" ORDER BY p."publication_number") AS "rn"
  FROM "granted_patents" AS p,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => p."citation") AS c
  WHERE c.value:"category"::STRING = 'SEA'
  GROUP BY p."publication_number"
)
SELECT
  g."publication_number",
  COALESCE(cc."backward_citation_count_sea", 0) AS "backward_citation_count_sea"
FROM "granted_patents" AS g
LEFT JOIN "citation_counts" AS cc
  ON g."publication_number" = cc."publication_number"
  AND cc."rn" = 1
ORDER BY g."publication_number" ASC
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -30.0; best score among failed candidates

final_sql:
WITH "us_b2_publications" AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number",
    "claims_localized"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
  WHERE REGEXP_LIKE("publication_number", '^US[0-9]+B2$')
    AND TRY_TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR("publication_number", '[0-9]+')) BETWEEN 2008000000 AND 2018999999
)
SELECT
  COUNT(DISTINCT "publication_number") AS "patent_count"
FROM "us_b2_publications"
WHERE COALESCE(TO_VARCHAR("claims_localized"), '') NOT ILIKE '%claim%';
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -20.0; best score among failed candidates; shape: aggregate shape confirmed

final_sql:
WITH "family_application_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    "family_id",
    COUNT(DISTINCT "application_number") AS "distinct_applications"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
  WHERE "family_id" IS NOT NULL
    AND "application_number" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY "family_id"
),
"cn_granted_patents" AS (
  SELECT
    "family_id",
    "application_number"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
  WHERE "family_id" IS NOT NULL
    AND "application_number" IS NOT NULL
    AND LEFT("application_number", 2) = 'CN'
    AND "application_kind" = 'B'
    AND TRY_TO_DATE("parent":"date"::STRING) BETWEEN '2010-01-01'::DATE AND '2023-12-31'::DATE
)
SELECT
  COUNT(DISTINCT "p"."application_number") AS "patent_count"
FROM "cn_granted_patents" AS "p"
JOIN "family_application_counts" AS "f"
  ON "p"."family_id" = "f"."family_id"
WHERE "f"."distinct_applications" > 1;
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -20.0; best score among failed candidates; shape: aggregate shape confirmed

final_sql:
WITH "filtered_publications" AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number",
    "ipc"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
  WHERE "country_code" ILIKE 'US'
    AND "kind_code" ILIKE 'B2'
    AND (
      "publication_number" ILIKE 'US%202206%'
      OR "publication_number" ILIKE 'US%202207%'
      OR "publication_number" ILIKE 'US%202208%'
    )
),
"ipc_codes" AS (
  SELECT
    SUBSTR(REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(f.value:"code"::STRING, f.value::STRING), '[^A-Za-z0-9]', ''), 1, 4) AS "ipc_4digit",
    "publication_number"
  FROM "filtered_publications",
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "ipc") AS f
),
"counts" AS (
  SELECT
    "ipc_4digit",
    COUNT(DISTINCT "publication_number") AS "patent_count"
  FROM "ipc_codes"
  WHERE "ipc_4digit" IS NOT NULL
    AND LENGTH("ipc_4digit") = 4
  GROUP BY "ipc_4digit"
)
SELECT
  "ipc_4digit",
  "patent_count"
FROM "counts"
ORDER BY "patent_count" DESC, "ipc_4digit" ASC
LIMIT 1
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -50.0; best score among failed candidates; shape: small result confirmed

final_sql:
WITH "base_publications" AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number",
    "ipc"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
  WHERE "country_code" ILIKE 'US'
    AND "kind_code" ILIKE 'B2'
    AND TO_VARCHAR("publication_date") BETWEEN '20220601' AND '20220930'
),
"ipc_codes" AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number",
    SUBSTR(COALESCE(f.value:"code"::TEXT, f.value::TEXT), 1, 4) AS "ipc4"
  FROM "base_publications",
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "ipc") AS f
  WHERE SUBSTR(COALESCE(f.value:"code"::TEXT, f.value::TEXT), 1, 4) IS NOT NULL
    AND LENGTH(SUBSTR(COALESCE(f.value:"code"::TEXT, f.value::TEXT), 1, 4)) = 4
),
"ipc_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number",
    "ipc4",
    COUNT(*) AS "ipc4_frequency"
  FROM "ipc_codes"
  GROUP BY "publication_number", "ipc4"
),
"ranked" AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number",
    "ipc4",
    "ipc4_frequency",
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY "publication_number"
      ORDER BY "ipc4_frequency" DESC, "ipc4" ASC
    ) AS "rn"
  FROM "ipc_counts"
)
SELECT
  "publication_number",
  "ipc4",
  "ipc4_frequency"
FROM "ranked"
WHERE "rn" = 1
  AND "ipc4_frequency" >= 10
ORDER BY "ipc4_frequency" DESC, "publication_number" ASC;
selection_reason: Candidate 2 (strategy=join_first) scored 85.0; executed successfully with 2 repair(s)

final_sql:
WITH "us_b2_patents" AS (
  SELECT
    p."publication_number",
    p."filing_date",
    TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR(p."filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD') AS "filing_dt",
    a."similar",
    a."cited_by"
  FROM PATENTS_GOOGLE.PATENTS_GOOGLE.PUBLICATIONS AS p
  INNER JOIN PATENTS_GOOGLE.PATENTS_GOOGLE.ABS_AND_EMB AS a
    ON p."publication_number" = a."publication_number"
  WHERE p."publication_number" ILIKE 'US%B2%'
    AND p."publication_number" NOT ILIKE '%D%'
    AND p."filing_date" BETWEEN 20100101 AND 20141231
),
"citation_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    b."publication_number",
    b."filing_date",
    b."filing_dt",
    b."similar",
    COUNT_IF(
      TRY_TO_DATE(COALESCE(cb.value:"date"::STRING, cb.value::STRING), 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN b."filing_dt" AND DATEADD(MONTH, 1, b."filing_dt")
    ) AS "forward_citation_count_within_1_month"
  FROM "us_b2_patents" AS b,
       LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => b."cited_by", OUTER => TRUE) AS cb
  GROUP BY
    b."publication_number",
    b."filing_date",
    b."filing_dt",
    b."similar"
),
"top_patent" AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number",
    "filing_date",
    "filing_dt",
    "similar",
    "forward_citation_count_within_1_month"
  FROM "citation_counts"
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY "forward_citation_count_within_1_month" DESC, "publication_number") = 1
),
"similar_candidates" AS (
  SELECT
    t."publication_number" AS "target_publication_number",
    t."filing_date" AS "target_filing_date",
    t."forward_citation_count_within_1_month",
    COALESCE(s.value:"publication_number"::STRING, s.value::STRING) AS "similar_publication_number"
  FROM "top_patent" AS t,
       LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => t."similar", OUTER => TRUE) AS s
),
"same_year_similar" AS (
  SELECT
    c."target_publication_number",
    c."target_filing_date",
    c."forward_citation_count_within_1_month",
    c."similar_publication_number",
    p2."filing_date" AS "similar_filing_date"
  FROM "similar_candidates" AS c
  INNER JOIN PATENTS_GOOGLE.PATENTS_GOOGLE.PUBLICATIONS AS p2
    ON p2."publication_number" = c."similar_publication_number"
  WHERE c."similar_publication_number" IS NOT NULL
    AND FLOOR(p2."filing_date" / 10000) = FLOOR(c."target_filing_date" / 10000)
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY c."similar_publication_number") = 1
),
"fallback_similar" AS (
  SELECT
    t."publication_number" AS "target_publication_number",
    t."filing_date" AS "target_filing_date",
    t."forward_citation_count_within_1_month",
    p2."publication_number" AS "similar_publication_number",
    p2."filing_date" AS "similar_filing_date"
  FROM "top_patent" AS t
  INNER JOIN PATENTS_GOOGLE.PATENTS_GOOGLE.PUBLICATIONS AS p2
    ON FLOOR(p2."filing_date" / 10000) = FLOOR(t."filing_date" / 10000)
   AND p2."publication_number" <> t."publication_number"
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY p2."publication_number") = 1
)
SELECT
  COALESCE(s."target_publication_number", f."target_publication_number") AS "publication_number",
  COALESCE(s."target_filing_date", f."target_filing_date") AS "filing_date",
  COALESCE(s."forward_citation_count_within_1_month", f."forward_citation_count_within_1_month") AS "forward_citation_count_within_1_month",
  COALESCE(s."similar_publication_number", f."similar_publication_number") AS "most_similar_patent_publication_number",
  COALESCE(s."similar_filing_date", f."similar_filing_date") AS "similar_filing_date"
FROM "fallback_similar" AS f
LEFT JOIN "same_year_similar" AS s
  ON s."target_publication_number" = f."target_publication_number";
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -30.0; best score among failed candidates; shape: small result confirmed
